docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATTERSON, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT PERLAS, AMPARO C. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
